news.title: Not All AI Stocks Are Falling These Days. Micron Is Rising on Strong Earnings
news.summary: Micron Technology posted quarterly earnings that topped analysts' estimates, sending shares higher in extended trading Wednesday.

news.title: Micron Crushes Earnings. The Stock Is Rising.
news.summary: Micron Technology  reported better-than-expected earnings results Wednesday afternoon.  For the November quarter, the chip company reported earnings per share of $4.78, compared to Wall Street’s consensus estimate of $3.96, according to FactSet.  Revenue came in at $13.6 billion, which was above analysts’ expectations of $12.9 billion.

news.title: Micron outlook's 'monster numbers' are the real earnings story
news.summary: Micron (MU) reported first quarter earnings results that beat Wall Street's estimates on the top and bottom lines. Morningstar Research services equity analyst, William Kerwin, joins Market Domination Overtime host Josh Lipton to discuss the company's print and forecast. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

news.title: Micron shares surge amid sharply higher revenue forecasts on AI-led memory demand
news.summary: Investing.com -- Micron Technology forecasts a sharp jump in revenue and earnings for the current quarter as higher memory prices, demand tied to AI workloads drove record first-quarter results. Shares of Micron were up about 6% in extended trading.
